message:
feat(core,abi,membrane): expand syscall veneer, runtime policy, and dual-mode math engine

Major expansion across three crates adding 900+ lines of syscall
infrastructure, runtime policy enforcement, and mathematical operation
dual-mode execution.

ABI (runtime_policy.rs, +115 lines):
- Expand runtime policy configuration with new enforcement modes
  and threshold-based activation rules

Core (syscall layer, ~430 lines):
- syscall/raw.rs: Add 262 lines of raw syscall wrapper implementations
  with safety annotations and errno mapping
- syscall/mod.rs: Expand syscall dispatch with 122 lines of new
  veneer functions and audit hooks
- pthread/mod.rs: Refine pthread wrapper signatures
- lib.rs: Minor export adjustment
- tests/syscall_veneer_test.rs: Add 44 lines of veneer correctness tests

Membrane (runtime_math, +381 lines):
- runtime_math/mod.rs: Implement dual-mode math engine supporting
  both strict (abort on domain error) and hardened (safe-default
  fallback) execution semantics
- Add runtime_math_dual_mode_e2e_test.rs end-to-end test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
